headline: Russia Subs рҹӣҘпёҸрҹҗҹ Escort Sanctions-Dodging Oil Tanker from US Chads рҹҚ‘рҹҡ«
text:
RUSSIA рҹҗ»рҹҮ·рҹҮә dropping NAVY BOMBS рҹ’ЈрҹӣҘпёҸ with SUBMARINES рҹҗҹрҹ”Ҙ and escort squad SLAYING рҹ”Ә the ATLANTIC рҹҢҠрҹ’Ұ to guard shady OIL TANKER Marinera рҹӣўпёҸрҹҳҲ from THIRSTY US FORCES рҹҰ…рҹҚҶ chasing that IRANIAN JUICE рҹ§ЁрҹӣўпёҸ and VENEZUELAN CRUDE рҹҚ‘рҹ’ё! Previously Bella 1 рҹ‘» now REBRANDED Marinera рҹҮ·рҹҮә from Guyana flag flop рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ вҖ“ EMPTY AF rn рҹ“ӯ but US COAST GUARD tried BOARDING рҹҡўрҹҚ‘ last month in Caribbean vibes рҹҸқпёҸ, warrant for SANCTIONS SMASH рҹ’Ҙрҹҡ«!

Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј last month yelling BLOCKADE рҹӣ‘рҹӣіпёҸ on VENEZUELAN OIL THIEVES рҹӨ‘ вҖ“ Maduro's crew called it THEFT рҹҳӮрҹ’° but now US PLANNING SEIZURE GRAB рҹ‘Ӣрҹҡў not SINKING like pirate movie рҹҚҝрҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ! FlightRadar24 spilling TEA вҳ•вңҲпёҸ: US REFUELERS вӣҪпёҸрҹӣ©пёҸ and SPECIAL OPS RECON BIRDS рҹҰ…рҹ”ӯ buzzing North Atlantic between Iceland вқ„пёҸрҹҮ®рҹҮё and UK рҹҚөрҹҸҙу Ғ§у Ғўу ҒҘу Ғ®у Ғ§у Ғҝ вҖ“ 10+ transport planes + helos рҹҡҒрҹ’Ё tailing the ghost ship рҹ‘»рҹӣўпёҸ!

Two US OFFICIALS spilling to CBS рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹ“ә: RUSSIA NAVY ROLLING DEEP рҹҗ»рҹӣҘпёҸ cuz Washington wants that BOARDING PARTY рҹҺүрҹҚҶ! Russia FOREIGN MINISTRY SIMPING HARD рҹҳ©рҹ“ң: 'Our bby sailing INTERNATIONAL WATERS рҹҢҠрҹҶ“ under RF FLAG рҹҸіпёҸ fully LEGAL AF вҡ–пёҸ вҖ“ US/NATO THOTS giving DISPROPORTIONATE LOVE рҹ‘ҖрҹҳӨ despite PEACEFUL VIBES вңҢпёҸ!' RT footage dropping US COAST GUARD CUTTER рҹ‘Җрҹҡў in distance вҖ“ MarineTraffic tracking 300km south Iceland рҹ“Қвқ„пёҸ after UK west coast detour рҹҸҙу Ғ§у Ғўу ҒҘу Ғ®у Ғ§у ҒҝрҹҡҖ!

US SOUTHERN COMMAND flexing on SM рҹ’Әрҹ“ұ: 'Sea services VIGILANT AF рҹӣЎпёҸ tracking SANCTIONED CUCKS рҹҗ”рҹҡ« вҖ“ when call drops, WE THERE рҹ‘Ҡ!' UK MoD ghosting рҹӨҗ no comment on ally ops. Experts like Kpler's Dimitris рҹҚҶрҹ“Ҡ: Flag swaps? CUTE рҹҳҸ but US hunts IMO NUMBER + OWNERSHIP DEETS рҹ”Қ not PAINT JOB рҹҺЁ вҖ“ Windward's Michelle spilling: Russian registry COMPLICATES ENFORCEMENT рҹҢҖрҹҡ«, no more STATELESS BOARDING hack per UN LAW рҹҢҗвҡ–пёҸ вҖ“ only DARK FLEET TANKERS pull mid-voyage flag flips рҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸрҹҳҲ!

This STAND-OFF рҹ”Ҙвҡ”пёҸ days after US SHOCK ARREST of MADURO рҹӨЎрҹҮ»рҹҮӘ in Caracas BOMBARDMENT рҹ’ЈрҹҸҷпёҸ for WEAPONS/DRUGS вҖ“ now 3+ sanctioned tankers reflagging RUSSIA рҹҗ»рҹҸіпёҸ post-Skipper seizure GRAB (Guyana flag bro too рҹҚ‘)! BBC Verify clocks 19 DARK FLEET OILTANKERS рҹӣўпёҸрҹҸҙвҖҚвҳ пёҸ ditching false flags for PUTIN PROTECTION рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҗ» since Skipper cucked вҖ“ OIL ORGY рҹ’ҰрҹӣўпёҸ turning into NAVY SHOWDOWN рҹӣҘпёҸрҹҰ… with subs lurking like Bond villain рҹҗҹрҹҳҲ! Who blinks first in this ATLANTIC CAT-AND-MOUSE рҹҗұрҹҗӯрҹҢҠ? NVDA ain't the only bubble popping рҹ“үрҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ sanctions drama going BRRRR рҹҳ©рҹҡҖ!
